headline: Cisco’s Quantum Switch Opens New Chapter For Long Term Network Story
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has introduced the Universal Quantum Switch, a new product for quantum networking. The switch is designed to route and translate quantum information across all major encoding modalities without destroying the data. It operates at room temperature and is built to work with existing telecom infrastructure. The launch aims to support secure, scalable quantum communication across devices from different manufacturers. Cisco is best known for its networking hardware,...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Cisco Systems (CSCO) After Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Gains?
summary: If you are asking whether Cisco Systems at US$91.85 is a fair price or not, you are exactly the kind of investor this breakdown is for. The stock shows returns of 3.2% over 7 days, 16.2% over 30 days, 20.8% year to date, 58.4% over 1 year, 115.8% over 3 years and 98.3% over 5 years, which puts recent price moves front and center in any valuation discussion. Recent attention around Cisco Systems has focused on its role as a large networking and infrastructure provider at the heart of global...
